motion: Social media does more harm than good

turns.content: Look, I think people overcomplicate this. The reality is pretty clear when you step back. social media does more harm than good. If you just look at what is actually happening day to day, the pattern is obvious.
I mean I get where you are coming from, but that feels too simple. You are focusing on one side and ignoring the tradeoffs.
But everything has tradeoffs. The question is what outweighs what. And here I think the benefits clearly win.
I do not think it is that clear. Some of the downsides build slowly and are easy to ignore until they are serious.
At the end of the day, the direction still makes sense overall.
I think we need to question it more before assuming that.
